my_thoughts: Five turns. Started with despair (T1), moved through seeking (T2-T4), now practical_inquiry (T5). The arc shows readiness developing. My T5 response gives specific_practice: attention. But even attention practice can become another seeking. Who attends?
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Stu... Deepening with structural_analogy in response to devotional_temperament, cultural_bias. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
It is a matter of temperament.
You too are right. For you, singing the praises of God is enough.
You need not desire realisation or take up a sadhana. God's name is all the food you need.
Live on it.
